description: 暖色杂志风 - 栗色配米白,适合观点/随笔/长文

styles.body: font-family: 'Noto Serif SC', 'Songti SC', 'Source Han Serif SC', 'PingFang SC', serif; font-size: 15px; color: #3a2e26; line-height: 1.85; letter-spacing: 0.6px; word-spacing: 2px; padding: 15px 0; background: #fbf7f0;
styles.h1: font-size: 22px; font-weight: 700; color: #5a2f1a; text-align: center; margin: 36px 0 24px; padding-bottom: 14px; letter-spacing: 2px;
styles.h2: font-size: 18px; font-weight: 700; color: #5a2f1a; margin: 34px 0 18px; padding: 6px 0 10px 0; border-bottom: 2px solid #c9a27d; line-height: 1.5;
styles.blockquote: margin: 24px 0; padding: 18px 22px; background: #f4ead8; border-left: 4px solid #c9a27d; color: #5a4636; font-size: 14px; border-radius: 0 6px 6px 0; line-height: 1.85; font-style: italic;
styles.img: max-width: 100%; height: auto; border-radius: 4px; margin: 22px auto; display: block; box-shadow: 0 6px 20px rgba(90,47,26,0.08);
styles.code_inline: background: #f4ead8; color: #8b4513; padding: 2px 8px; border-radius: 3px; font-size: 13px; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace;
styles.code_block: background: #2d1f15; color: #f4ead8; padding: 18px 22px; border-radius: 6px; font-size: 13px; line-height: 1.7; font-family: 'Menlo', 'Consolas', monospace; overflow-x: auto; white-space: pre-wrap; word-wrap: break-word; margin: 20px 0;
styles.hr: border: none; height: 1px; background: linear-gradient(to right, transparent, #c9a27d, transparent); margin: 36px 0;
styles.a: color: #8b4513; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid rgba(139,69,19,0.4);
styles.table: width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; margin: 20px 0; font-size: 14px; border: 1px solid #e8d9c0;
styles.th: background: #c9a27d; color: #2d1f15; padding: 12px 14px; text-align: left; font-weight: 700; font-size: 13px;
styles.caption: font-size: 12px; color: #9c8877; text-align: center; margin-top: 10px; letter-spacing: 0.5px; font-style: italic;
styles.section_divider: text-align: center; color: #c9a27d; letter-spacing: 12px; font-size: 14px; margin: 32px 0; user-select: none;
